name: Cymatic Resonance
description: A resonant plate whose Chladni nodal figure is selected live by the music's brightness — as the track brightens the figure blooms into finer, more complex 4-fold-symmetric patterns; a bass drop snaps it back to a big simple figure. The figure you see is the pitch of the sound made solid. Plus-basis square-plate eigenmode superposition rendered as a strong-oblique-tilt displaced relief, jewel-emissive nodal ridges on a deep-black plate, lit via a height-gradient-derived normal + GGX, through ACES + bloom. CR.1 clay maquette — materials / micro-grain / secondary audio at CR.2–CR.3.
author: Matt
